lastSessionSummary: Phase 4 in progress. UI redesign complete (Desert Night theme). RevenueCat installed, DB migration with RLS + 7 functions, hooks for membership/family/purchases, Family Crew screen, Membership screen, connection limit enforcement. 71 tests passing. RevenueCat App Store Connect config in progress.
nextSteps: Complete RevenueCat App Store Connect configuration
Device test gate tests for Phase 4
Start Phase 5: Settings, Location & Background Services
openQuestions: Social auth (Google/Facebook) deferred — needs dev build + provider config
GradientBackground permanently dropped — solid #0F2419 on auth screens
Push notifications deferred to Phase 5 (requires Edge Function + device testing)
Edge Functions (send-push-notification, send-invite-email, send-support-email) deferred to Phase 5

phases.name: Project Scaffold & Infrastructure
phases.description: New Expo project with Supabase, NativeWind, and CI foundation.

tasks.name: Install and configure NativeWind with brand theme
Set up Supabase client with session persistence
Create initial Supabase migration with full schema

gateTests.name: Expo export build succeeds
EAS dev build compiles for iOS simulator
Supabase client connects and queries
NativeWind renders styled component
Tailwind config has all brand colors/fonts
.env is gitignored and not tracked
Jest runs with passing placeholder test
Deprecation review: Expo SDK, React Native, NativeWind, AsyncStorage, app.config.js, TypeScript

phases.name: Auth & User Profiles
phases.description: Sign up, log in, complete onboarding, persisted profile with photo uploads.

tasks.name: Enable Supabase Email/Password + Google + Facebook auth
Create RLS policies for profiles table
Create Storage buckets with RLS (profile-photos, rv-photos)
Build root layout with auth gate
Create Zod schemas for all forms

gateTests.name: Zod schemas validate correct/incorrect input
useAuth returns correct states
Sign up → profile row created in Supabase
Log in → session persisted to AsyncStorage
Log out → session cleared, redirect to login
Onboarding → profile updated with all steps
Profile photo upload → Storage + URL saved
RV photo upload → Storage + URL saved
RLS: user can only read/update own profile
E2E: full signup → onboarding → home screen
Deprecation review: Supabase Auth v2 methods, expo-image-picker, expo-secure-store, Zod

phases.name: Connections & Neighbor Discovery
phases.description: Discover neighbors on map/list, send/accept connections, check-in locations.

tasks.name: Build Neighbors List/Map screen with radius filter
Build Friends screen (All / Close / Pending tabs)
Build User Detail screen with connection actions
Create useNeighbors hook with real distance calc

gateTests.name: Haversine distance calculation is accurate
Connection status derivation works all states
Send request → row created, recipient sees it
Accept request → connection created, bidirectional
Decline request → no connection created
Radius filter actually filters by distance
Discovery only shows non-connected users
Check-in saves coordinates + location name
RLS: requests only visible to sender/recipient
DB function: accept is atomic (no partial state)
E2E: send request → accept → see in neighbors
Deprecation review: react-native-maps, expo-location, React Query v5 patterns

phases.name: Real-Time Messaging
phases.description: Direct and group messaging with real-time delivery and push notifications.

tasks.name: Create RLS policies for messaging tables
Create DB functions (create_or_get_direct_conversation, get_conversations_for_user, mark_messages_as_read, create_group_conversation)
Build Chat screen with real-time messages
Wire Message button on User Detail screen
Add unread badge to Messages tab

gateTests.name: Message validation (max 500 chars, not empty)
Create direct conversation → both users see it
Create group conversation → all participants see it
Send message → appears for all participants
Realtime: message appears without refresh
Unread count increments/resets correctly
RLS: only see own conversations
RLS: only send to own conversations
E2E: send message → recipient sees it
Deprecation review: Supabase Realtime channel API, expo-notifications, expo-linking

phases.name: Membership, Family & IAP
phases.description: RevenueCat integration, membership tiers, family management with invites.

tasks.name: Redesign: New Group screen (match Sleek design)
Redesign: Run full test suite + verify no regressions
RLS policies + DB functions for families, invites, push_tokens
Add Family Crew + Membership nav to Profile tab
Configure RevenueCat in App Store Connect

gateTests.name: Connection limit enforcement (basic blocks at 8)
Family capacity calculation correct per tier
Purchase → entitlement → Supabase tier updated
Send invite → email sent, invite row created
Accept invite → member added to family
Cancel invite → status updated
Downgrade tier → members over limit warned
RLS: family data only visible to members
E2E: free user hits 8 connections → upgrade prompt
Deprecation review: RevenueCat SDK, StoreKit 2 config, Supabase Edge Functions

phases.name: Settings, Location & Background Services
phases.description: Privacy controls, location sharing, off-the-grid, background location, notifications.

tasks.name: Build Profile view screen with check-in

gateTests.name: Off-the-grid expiry calculation correct
Radius validation within allowed range
Toggle location sharing → persisted in Supabase
Change radius → affects neighbor query visibility
Off-the-grid → user hidden from queries
Off-the-grid expires → user visible again
Push notification sent to message participants
Background task updates coordinates (with session check)
Support form → email sent via Edge Function
Check-in → location saved, visible to connections
RLS: location settings only editable by owner
E2E: toggle off-the-grid → hidden from search
Deprecation review: expo-location background, expo-notifications push tokens, Sentry SDK, expo-updates

phases.name: Polish, Error Handling & Production Prep
phases.description: Error boundaries, loading states, RLS audit, App Store assets, final QA.

tasks.name: Add loading skeletons for all screens
Add empty states (no connections, messages, etc.)
Add pull-to-refresh on all list screens
Review and tighten all RLS policies
Add rate limiting to Edge Functions
Prepare App Store screenshots and metadata
Configure EAS Submit with real credentials
Final .env audit — no secrets in source

gateTests.name: Error boundary catches render errors, shows fallback
Network offline → graceful error states + retry
All forms validate with Zod before submission
Security: no API keys in source code
Security: all RLS policies reviewed
Performance: app loads to home in <3 seconds
Full E2E: signup → onboarding → discover → connect → message → checkin → settings
Deprecation review: expo-doctor clean, npm outdated clean, EAS config, splash screen, iOS Privacy Manifest
